items.title: Ethereum’s biggest protocol overhaul in years moves into its final development stage
items.summary: Developers are entering the final stretch of work on Glamsterdam, the network's next major upgrade, as teams begin testing a version of the fork in a closed environment.

items.title: Forget the price charts. Here's how bitcoin and S&P 500 look like when adjusted for the money printer
items.summary: Valuations shaped by M2 money supply growth paint reveal concerning trends for risk assets.

items.title: XRP gives back breakout gains, slipping below $1.23 on heavy selling
items.summary: XRP briefly traded above key resistance before sellers stepped in, with rising volume suggesting traders used the rally to cut positions rather than add risk.

items.title: Here is why Strategy's dividend-paying crypto stock is crashing to near-historic lows
items.summary: Strategy's bitcoin-backed preferred stock remains well below par value as concerns over dividend coverage and stronger competition from Strive's SATA.

items.title: Bitcoin miners' AI pivot faces $50 billion reality check, says VanEck
items.summary: VanEck says investors are shifting focus from contract announcements to execution risk as miners chase AI revenue.

items.title: Tether Gold now has a dedicated options market on Bybit
items.summary: These options, settled in USDT, let traders hedge risk, speculate on gold prices.

items.title: Bitcoin metric near ‘low-risk’ zone after holders absorb 125K BTC in June: Time for a rebound?
items.summary: Bitcoin’s Sharpe ratio and a 125,000 BTC increase in BTC accumulator demand mark the start of a new demand phase. Will prices follow?

items.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
items.summary: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.

items.title: Binance says it considers EU license compliant amid reports of potential rejection
items.summary: Without specifically calling out a report on Binance’s EU license, the crypto exchange warned that any rejection forcing it to delay activities in the region could “weaken liquidity” and present other potential risks.

items.title: Why a ‘safe’ AI can turn dangerous in the wrong company
items.summary: A 15-day AI agent simulation shows why short tests may miss long-term risks shaped by tools, rules and other agents.

items.title: US government watchdog urges FDIC to coordinate on crypto oversight
items.summary: The US Government Accountability Office says that regulators, including the FDIC, lack an “ongoing coordination mechanism for addressing blockchain risks.”

items.title: BitGo offers Europe’s crypto firms a MiCA-compliance lifeline as license deadline looms
items.summary: BaFin-regulated BitGo says its Crypto-as-a-Service platform can help eligible crypto players across Europe with an alternative way to navigate MiCA.

items.title: Crypto PAC's $12 million Senate candidate, Barry Moore, wins Alabama GOP primary
items.summary: The Trump loyalist drew more crypto dollars than any candidate so far in this year's midterms, and the result marks a big win for the industry's political arm.

items.title: Live markets: Markets turn their focus to the Fed as oil returns to pre-war levels
items.summary: Bitcoin's Sharpe ratio hit a level that has marked every cycle low since 2015, but in each case it preceded months of basing rather than an immediate rebound.

items.title: Uniswap jumps 22% and altcoins rip while bitcoin stalls before the Fed
items.summary: UNI surged after Standard Chartered set a $100 long-term target, and HYPE and solana led a broad altcoin bid. Bitcoin held near $66,000 as oil fell to a three-month low and the Fed met for the first time under Kevin Warsh.

items.title: Congress reaches deal on housing bill with CBDC ban until 2030
items.summary: The US could soon temporarily ban a central bank digital currency, as House and Senate leaders came to a deal on the 21st Century Road to Housing Act.

items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Strategy’s STRC falls to $91 as investors flinch at latest BTC buying
items.summary: “It appears traders are seeing the latest BTC acquisition as an unsustainable path for STRC,” said 10x Research’s Markus Thielen.

items.title: Illinois governor approves crypto transaction tax despite industry uproar
items.summary: “There is effectively no comparable state financial transaction tax on stocks, bonds or derivatives anywhere in the country,” said a16z general counsel Miles Jennings.

items.title: Hyperliquid open interest surges 32% in week: Is $80 HYPE next?
items.summary: Despite mixed HYPE derivatives market signals, Hyperliquid’s explosive TradFi perpetual growth makes a push toward $80 increasingly realistic.
